Class EnumConstantDeclaration

java.lang.Object
recoder.java.JavaSourceElement
recoder.java.JavaProgramElement
recoder.java.JavaNonTerminalProgramElement
recoder.java.declaration.JavaDeclaration
recoder.java.declaration.VariableDeclaration
recoder.java.declaration.FieldDeclaration
recoder.java.declaration.EnumConstantDeclaration
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable, Cloneable, Declaration, MemberDeclaration, NonTerminalProgramElement, ProgramElement, TypeReferenceContainer, SourceElement, ModelElement
public class EnumConstantDeclaration extends FieldDeclaration implements MemberDeclaration
